name: yappatron
description: voice dictation for mac with always-on listening and configurable push-to-talk.

features.title: streaming text
features.body: Text flows in as you speak. Deepgram Nova-3 for cloud accuracy, or fully local with Parakeet.

features.title: built for vibe coding
features.body: Talk to your AI. Describe what you want. Auto-enters when you pause so Claude responds instantly.

features.title: best-in-class accuracy
features.body: Deepgram Nova-3 with punctuation, capitalization, and smart formatting. Sub-300ms latency.

features.title: knows who's talking
features.body: Enroll your voice once. Yappatron labels every line so two-person conversations stream as [Alex] / [Mom] right into your editor. Hybrid Deepgram + local voiceprint matching.

features.title: local or cloud — your call
features.body: Switch between Deepgram cloud STT and fully local Parakeet from the menu bar. Your words, your rules.

steps.label: start talking
steps.detail: no button to press. just speak naturally wherever your cursor is.

steps.label: watch it stream
steps.detail: text appears character by character as you talk, with live corrections.

steps.label: pause to send
steps.detail: stop talking and it auto-presses enter. perfect for chatting with claude.

steps.label: keep going
steps.detail: it's always listening. start your next thought whenever you're ready.
